headline: ₹0-50 Cr at risk (only if disclosure lapses trigger regulatory scrutiny) — Adani Green Energy's 5 GW greenfield expansion sets global record, signaling sectoral momentum but limited direct impact for Adani Power.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; no penalties or deadlines triggered.
No immediate P/E or margin effect; possible long-term premium if ESG narrative is integrated.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital if ESG disclosures are improved; no direct bond spread impact.
